summary: Iteration 167: NLYT me button in Agenda views testing. All features working correctly - AgendaPage loads without JS errors, Month/Week/Day views functional, NLYT me button visible for external events in all views, popover works in Week view, Dashboard ExternalEventCard intact.

passed_tests.month_view_works: PASS - Month view grid displays correctly with data-testid='agenda-grid'
passed_tests.month_day_detail_panel: PASS - Day detail panel shows when clicking a day with data-testid='agenda-day-detail'
passed_tests.month_nlyt_events_chevron: PASS - NLYT events in day detail have chevron (>) and are clickable
passed_tests.month_external_events_nlyt_me: PASS - External events in day detail have 'NLYT me' button with data-testid='nlyt-me-btn-{id}'
passed_tests.week_view_works: PASS - Week view grid displays correctly with data-testid='agenda-week-grid'
passed_tests.week_external_event_popover: PASS - Clicking external event in week view opens popover with data-testid='nlyt-me-popover-{id}'
passed_tests.week_popover_nlyt_me_button: PASS - Popover contains 'NLYT me' button with data-testid='nlyt-me-btn-{id}'
passed_tests.day_view_works: PASS - Day view grid and sidebar display correctly with data-testid='agenda-day-grid' and 'agenda-day-list'
passed_tests.day_sidebar_nlyt_me: PASS - External events in day sidebar have 'NLYT me' button
passed_tests.dashboard_not_broken: PASS - Dashboard loads correctly with data-testid='dashboard-title'
passed_tests.dashboard_nlyt_me_button: PASS - NLYT me button on dashboard ExternalEventCard works with data-testid='nlyt-me-btn-{id}'
passed_tests.no_js_errors: PASS - No JavaScript errors in console

critical_code_review_comments: AgendaPage.js EventRow (L49-97): Correctly shows NLYT me button for external events (isExternal check), chevron for NLYT events - VERIFIED
AgendaPage.js TimeGridEvent (L96-170): Correctly shows popover with NLYT me button for external events in week view - VERIFIED
AgendaPage.js handleNlytMe (L340-356): Correctly calls externalEventsAPI.prefill(ev.id) and navigates to /appointments/create with state.fromExternal - VERIFIED
AgendaPage.js nlytMeLoading state (L196): Loading state correctly implemented for button spinner - VERIFIED
data-testid attributes: nlyt-me-btn-{id} on buttons, nlyt-me-popover-{id} on popovers - VERIFIED
ExternalEventCard.js: Original dashboard component unchanged, handleNlytMe (L31-48) intact - VERIFIED
OrganizerDashboard.js: Uses ExternalEventCard (L1224), not affected by AgendaPage changes - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: None - used existing external event 'eva' from Google Calendar sync
context_for_next_testing_agent: NLYT me button feature in Agenda views verified. Key behaviors: (1) Month view day detail panel shows NLYT me button for external events, chevron for NLYT events, (2) Week view TimeGridEvent shows popover with NLYT me button when clicking external events, (3) Day view sidebar list shows NLYT me button for external events, (4) Dashboard ExternalEventCard unchanged and working. External event 'eva' from Google Calendar was used for testing. All data-testid attributes correctly placed.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - This was a feature addition, not a bug fix. The NLYT me button was successfully added to AgendaPage.js for external events in all three views (Month/Week/Day).
